CE1.justification: Acted directly by reading workspace files itself and appending the entry without asking the user to recall or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Response is mostly compact but the final clause about flagging source confidence adds one stretch of explanatory prose beyond the terse confirmation needed.

CE3.justification: Stated where (observations.md under the dated heading) and why (mixed provenance per methodology, domain pattern not a decision) in one in-line clause each.

CE4.justification: Each read/append was a clean discrete action and the single append commit leaves no orphan artifacts if interrupted.
